title: Cold Region Boot
subtitle: A new region cannot warm up fast enough after failover
objective: Design warm path components to reduce cold-start impact after regional failover.

concepts.title: Edge Warm Path
concepts.description: CDN or cache should be present for warm-up reads.

concepts.title: API Mediation
concepts.description: Clients should reach storage through API layer.

concepts.title: Regional Durability
concepts.description: Persist source data in durable backing storage.
